+

+def bfs_hops(adj, start):

+    N = len(adj)

+    hops = [float('inf')] * N

+    hops[start] = 0

+    q = [start]

+    for u in q:

+        for v, _ in adj[u]:

+            if hops[v] == float('inf'):

+                hops[v] = hops[u] + 1

+                q.append(v)

+    return hops
